ahkimn/subwaybuilder-regions.name: v0.4.5
ahkimn/subwaybuilder-regions.body:
## v0.4.5 - 2026-03-04

_Game version_ v1.1.0

### New Features

- Added GB `wpcs` support for Westminster Parliamentary Constituencies (ONS July 2024 boundaries).
- Added online fetch support for CA `peds` via hosted `.geojson.gz` source (no longer local-only in runtime fetch flows).
- Added shared remote compressed GeoJSON loader utility for script pipelines so hosted binary `.geojson.gz` sources can be reused across datasets/countries.

### Other Updates

- GB population attachment is now sourced from NOMIS API for all GB datasets (`districts`, `wpcs`, `bua`, `wards`)
  - Deprecated local CSV population matching path in GB extraction scripts.

gio1112/subway-builder-citymapper.name: v0.1.2 | Minor efficiency changes
gio1112/subway-builder-citymapper.body: Made the code more efficient, thats really all, should be better and fix some bugs maybe fps too.

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.3.0 "Phoenix" (Compatibility Update)
danield1909/dantrains.body:
- Added 1.2.2 beta compatibility
    - Track maintenance costs subject to change
- Fixed various glitches related to the save loader
- Added 6 trams from Melbourne

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.2.1 "Phoenix" (Hotfix)
danield1909/dantrains.body:
- Fixed a glitch which caused newly registered trains to have dramatically incorrect maxSlopePercentages
    - To fix any trains affected, simply enter the game, save again, and then reload

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.2.0 "Phoenix" (Minor Update)
danield1909/dantrains.body:
- Adjusted minCurveRadii to use a new formula.
    - If the new value smaller, the track will automatically update existing tracks, otherwise it will not to avoid breaking the game
- Increased parallel track separation and track clearance to more realistic values
- Cost multipliers are now based off of shape based area instead of a linear relationship
    - Aka bores are calculated as circles now
    - Also taking into account placement of track in the tube
- New tunnel costs are based off of said new track separation values
- For the sake of avoiding the bricking of prior saves, the new track geometry and associcated numbers are not retroactively applied.
    - I have not tested this but honestly I would be shocked if changing track parallel spacing for already laid track *didn't* brick a save
- Track multiplier explanations have been removed temporarily until a new UI is ready for them
    - The multipliers themselves are still there which is more important. Just know wider and/or catenary = tunnels more expensive. 
- Fixed the MBTA Blue Line behaving as if the entire line is *both* catenary and third rail
    - Now it uses catenary above ground and third-rail below

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.1.2 "Phoenix" (Hotfix)
danield1909/dantrains.body:
- Fixed a glitch prevent legacy trains from being imported correctly

Thank you to Noahhhhhhhh from the SubwayBuilder Discord for help fixing this one

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.1.1 "Phoenix" (Hotfix)
danield1909/dantrains.body: - Actually fixed the glitch causing crashes on menu start for new users

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.1.0 "Phoenix" (Minor Update)
danield1909/dantrains.body:
- Hopefully fixed a glitch causing crashes on menu start
- Added Singapore (MRT and LRT)
- Added more tags (NYC A Division, NYC B Division, Future Tech, and Ansaldo-Breda Driverless Metros)
- Added unit conversions for those who are uncivilized
- Added depth multipliers (I am sorry for taking this long to add them)
- Expanded NYC rolling stock to include the entire current fleet + the future planned ones
- Added a new type of metro called the Weird Metro. This is for the trains which are metros but still have level crossings for some bizzare reason
- Made the description text smaller

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.0.3 "Phoenix" (Mini Patch)
danield1909/dantrains.body:
- Added support for light mode
- Fixed some glitches with the main-menu individual train registration
- Added an in game notification when trains get registered (does not work for main menu)
- Added a disable of the register button after it's already been pressed to prevent accidental spam
- Sorted trains alphabetically instead of by length

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.0.2 "Phoenix" (Hotfix)
danield1909/dantrains.body:
- Fixed a glitch which led to trains being deleted from a train save file upon re-save
- Added second menu to help recover said deleted trains
- Fixed a duplication error

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DanielD1909/danTrains/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.2

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.0.1 "Phoenix" (Hotfix)
danield1909/dantrains.body: Fixed a major glitch which prevented the build menu from working properly

danield1909/dantrains.name: Version 1.0.0 "Phoenix"
danield1909/dantrains.body:
Welcome to the release of danTrains 1.0.0 "Phoenix"!

There's been a lot of changes since the last version so here's a broad summary changelog:
- danTrains is now a standalone mod with no other requirements. This was done primarily due to the outdatedness of addTrains.
- Three new menus have been added, two as pop ups in game and one on the main menu. The instructions will explain how to use them.
    - Panel 1 - Train Registration: Allows you to register trains in game
    - Panel 2 - Train Dictionary: Allows you to search through all the train types in more detail in game,
    - Panel 3 - Main Menu Save Loader: Allows saves to not break
- Perth, Australia has been added with 3 trains thanks to Pio from the SubwayBuilder discord
- Tags have been directly made visible
- danTrains has been added to Railyard (unless you were like super quick to this in which case I may be doing it rn)
- Mod structure has been changed to allow easier updating of train data which should provide faster train updates in the future
- Automation, Electrification, Track Gauge, and Loading Gauge are all things you can now choose for all trains when adding them
    - In the future this will affect track compatibility but the game cannot handle that yet
- Train speed on curves has been adjusted to match real life standards (based on track geometry but converted to lateral acceleration bc that is what the game uses)
- All costs have been set to approximate Mediterranean prices
    - I was not able to find good sources on my own so I will admit I asked ChatGPT for Italian prices and then did some scrutinizing
    - If you have better sources let me know
    - Train cost per hour is a very American metric as in Europe they do cost per km per passenger or just cost per km
    - This has basically universally lowered prices which does make the game easier but it is what everyone voted for
    - Commuter Rail is still very expensive tho. Because it is in real life.
- Spreadsheet has not been updated and is no longer a priority due to the existence of the in-game dictionary
- Lateral acceleration limits no longer affected by automation. 
- Added 1.2.1 beta compatibility for the new station length feature.
- Once registered, descriptions now include track type and creator. Trying to figure out the best way to do tags.
- Continents have been replaced with Regions since continents are big and hard to define while regions are smaller and slightly easier to define
- Train Dropdown is now typable inside of so you can just start typing and find what you want.
- Various other minor things I cannot remember at this exact moment 

PLEASE NOTE: NEW FEATURES ARE A LITTLE FINNICKY BUT NOTHING SHOULD BE GAMEBREAKING. I OFFER NO GUARANTEES THOUGH, JUST MY EXPERIENCE.

INSTRUCTIONS:

1. Registering trains:
    1. To register a train you need to open the registration tab once you are in a game and ensure Automation, Electrification, Track Gauge, and Loading Gauge are all set
    2. Click Preview
    3. Review the stats and see the description and also make sure your train lengths are right
    4. Click register to register
    5. Check to make sure it worked
    6. Save the game with a specific name so you can use it in the future (THINGS DO NOT SAVE WITHOUT AT LEAST AN AUTOSAVE, AND AN AUTOSAVE WILL OVERWRITE ANY OTHER AUTOSAVES)
2. Loading Saves:
    1. Locate the big panel in the main menu that should have "Dan Trains" in it
    2. Navigate the dropdown to the save you want to play.
    3. Press the white button
    4. Load your save as normal
3. Managing Save Data:
    1. If you want to delete any data, go to the panel at the front.
    2. Select the save data you want to delete from the dropdown.
    3. Press the red button.
    4. As a failsafe, you need to press a second (formerly dark red, now red) button
    5. If you click on the dropdown you should see that it is gone.
4. IMPORTING LEGACY SAVES:
    1. First, make sure the trains are DanTrains Gen 1 Trains and not from some other mod. I cannot import those ones.
    2. Open SubwayBuilder with the following mods enabled:
        1. [DanTrains Gen1 (0.3.1) (NEW VERSION)](https://github.com/DanielD1909/danTrainsGen1/releases/tag/Final)
        2. addTrains DT (comes with 0.3.1 DanTrains)
        3. DanTrains 1.0.0 Phoenix
    3. Open the game with the correct trains enabled via addTrains.
    4. Save the game (probably with a new name just in case)
    5. Exit to menu and then disable danTrains 0.3.1 and addTrains DT
    6. Open the game
    7. Follow Loading Saves instructions

Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.name: v0.2.0
Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.body:
## What's Changed
* Set custom command line args by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/220
* Fix the link in the README (did we make up a Steam ID???) by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/208
* [Backend] Move file dialogs to a separate file by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/224
* [Backend] Add import map support in downloader + centralize map validation by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/223
* [Backend] Implement import state persistence via profiles by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/226
* [Frontend] Add import flow to Library + Map Conflict resolution by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/227
* [Frontend] Add city code for all Maps + name Tags column by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/228
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 1) - General Layout & Style by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/229
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 2) - Colors by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/231
* [Frontend] Make search less lenient by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/233
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 3) - Components by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/232
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 4) - Homepage by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/234
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 5) - Browse by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/238
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 6) - Library by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/239
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 7) - Logs by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/243
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 8) - Settings by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/244
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 9) - Setup by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/245
* Harry Truman's "Fourteen" Points (Phase 10) - Project by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/249
* Miscellaneous Fixes by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/252
* Harry Truman's "Fourteen" Points (Phase 11) - Consistency/Consolidation by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/254
* Dependency management by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/248
* Fix dependency installation not working on custom releases by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/257
* Harry Truman's "Fourteen" Points (Phase 12) - Tests by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/256
* Discord and GitHub Icon by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/258
* Harry Truman's "Fifteen" Points (Phase 13) - Themes by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/259
* Fixed Game Version Parsing by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/260
* [Backend] Add Create/Swap/Delete profiles affordances by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/261
* Fix MacOS spawn command by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/263
* [Backend] Enforce PMTiles present for validate install by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/264
* Harry Truman's "Fifteen" Points (Phase 14) - Themes & Dependencies by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/266
* Fix Import Asset Dialogue by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/269
* Fix Dev Tools by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/270
* [Backend] Atomic registry clone / extractor writes + prep for future registry rename by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/271
* [CI] Add CI by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/272
* Homepage Download Count Fix by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/274
* Sidebar Lag by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/275
* [Backend/Frontend] Initial multi-profile implementation by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/276
* Harry Truman's "Fifteen" Points (Phase 15) - Profiles by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/277
* Deep Link Shenanigans by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/279
* Harry Truman's "Fifteen" Points (Phase 15.1) - Profiles (Again) by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/278
* Fix Start-Game by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/281
* [Backend] Fix bootstrap/swap behavior for locally installed maps by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/284
* [Frontend] Block profile mutation while game is running by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/287
* Fix Library Alignment by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/282


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/compare/v0.1.6...v0.2.0

* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 1) - General Layout & Style by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/229
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 2) - Colors by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/231
* [Frontend] Make search less lenient by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/233
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 3) - Components by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/232
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 4) - Homepage by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/234
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 5) - Browse by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/238
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 6) - Library by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/239
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 7) - Logs by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/243
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 8) - Settings by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/244
* Harry Truman's "Twelve" Points (Phase 9) - Setup by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/245

Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.name: v0.1.6
Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.body:
## What's Changed
* [BE] Add additional test coverage. Pre-push hooks by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/171
* Add GitHub Key Validation by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/174
* Add a .railyard_asset salt file to Railyard-Managed assets by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/175
* [BE] Fix broken tests + remove remaining non-os-specific file paths by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/177
* Project: Emerald by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/178
* Ensure salts are added to Railyard assets after update by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/181
* [Backend] Bootstrap installed state on initialization + enforcement of pre-push hooks by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/180
* Remove Right-Click Context Menu by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/185
* Fixed spawn paths for linux by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/186
* Better Logs by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/184
* Fix Multi-Select by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/191
* [Backend] Evil AI helps add test coverage + Human moves files around by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/189
* Post #184 Changes by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/192
* [Backend] Fix bootstrapping on bad install state by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/193
* Add Deep Link Integration with Website by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/173
* Update Logs and massive refactor of return types by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/194
* [Backend / Frontend] Show pending updates to Library by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/196
* [Backend] Add initialViewState to MapManifest + fix test pollution of real files by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/199
* [Frontend] Various small fixes by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/200
* [Frontend] Color consistency on FE Install pages by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/202
* Fix version comparison logic in updater by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/203
* [FE] Fix Hover/Icon Colors by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/204
* Fix the updater logic again by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/205
* Fix Deep Links (Hopefully?) by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/206


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/compare/v0.1.5...v0.1.6

Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.name: v0.1.5
Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.body:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/compare/v0.1.4...v0.1.5

## What's Changed
* [Backend] Atomic + transactional writes + profile bootstrapping for missing fields by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/161
* [Hotfix] Fix Sorting Order by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/163
* [Backend] Better filepath normalization by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/164
* Add an option to install chrome-sandbox for Linux by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/166
* Add More Logging and panic when sandbox install improperly called by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/167
* Fix the series of commands to install the sandbox by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/168
* View Mode by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/157
* [BE] Propagate Downloader errors to FE by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/169
* Discover Page by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/170

Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.name: v0.1.4
Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.body:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/compare/v0.1.3...v0.1.4

## What's Changed
* [Frontend] Add fuse.js for better searching by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/102
* Frontend UI Tweaks Collection™️ by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/104
* Various Small Tweaks by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/108
* (Probably) fix pnpm store location by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/109
* [Frontend] Add country pills + download counts to map/mod cards on Browse by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/113
* [Frontend/ Backend] Propagate update timestamps to search by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/118
* [Backend] Prevent concurrent instances of Railyard by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/125
* [Backend] Auto-heal on invalid mods/maps | Type agnostic install/uninstall methods by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/124
* Add a Library Page by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/122
* Library (The Third Iteration) by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/131
* Filter Assets and Versions by Integrity Index by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/132
* Add counts to the tags in the Search Sidebar by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/120
* New Linux Build Process by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/140
* [Backend / Frontend] Add optional Github authentication (via Config) + cache versions by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/139
* [Backend / Frontend] Unify UpdateSubscriptions shape + allow in-flight cancellations by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/137
* Fix Updater and Update the Build Script Again by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/142
* `ghp_` --> `github_pat_` by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/143
* [Backend] Update cancel installations to immediately propagate to FE by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/144
* [Backend][Linux] Use flatpak-spawn to launch game by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/149
* [FE] Unify Library/Search filters + keep separate filter state by AssetType by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/148
* [Linux] Fix flatpak permissions in CI by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/150
* [Linux] Reconcile app name (org.SBM.Railyard) by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/151
* Add --no-sandbox option to flatpak-spawn command by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/152
* Update Linux dependencies in release workflow by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/154
* [Frontend / Backend] Prevent stale download progress bar / pending cancellation toasts by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/155

Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.name: v0.1.3
Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.body:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/compare/v0.1.2...v0.1.3

## What's Changed
* Minor Fix to extractMod by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/52
* [Backend][Profile] Add update subscriptions to latest endpoint... by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/53
* Check for and install updates on start by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/56
* Light Mode by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/58
* [Backend][Downloader] Graceful handling of downloader warns and enforcement of no-ops by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/59
* Change to Linux Build by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/60
* URGENT: FIX UPDATER FOR ALL PLATFORMS by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/62
* Fix the linux builds by making a current and legacy build by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/63
* Remove Git Credentials Requirement by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/68
* Manual Check for Update Button, Footer displaying current version by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/70
* Update Installed List on Download Queue Task Finish by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/73
* [Backend] Sync registry service schema to The-Railyard + fix download counts by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/71
* auto-tag release candidates as prereleases by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/74
* Initialize Registry before Update Checking by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/75
* Fix the Updater for our new Linux Builds by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/76
* Fix Windows doing everything with UTF-16-LE by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/78
* [Frontend] Flatten search params for new map fields + persist search state by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/77
* Toast on Manual Update Check by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/88

## What's Changed
* [Backend] Add downloading queue by @ahkimn in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/40
* Swap map/mod order and add punctuation (for site parity) by @kaicardenas0618 in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/45
* Mod File Validation by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/47
* Add an Uninstall Button next to Update Button by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/48
* Remove Population as a sort option when not looking at maps only by @Kronifer in https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard/pull/49

Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.name: v0.1.0
Subway-Builder-Modded/railyard.body:
We're excited to announce the first public release of **Railyard** - the all-in-one map and mod manager for Subway Builder.

Railyard is a free, open-source desktop app that makes it easy to discover, install, and manage community-made content for Subway Builder. No more digging through Discord threads or manually dragging files into folders - just browse, click, and play.

**Download:** <https://subwaybuildermodded.com/railyard>

*Railyard is still in beta, so please help us out by reporting any problems you have on the GitHub repository!*
## Thank You
Railyard wouldn't exist without the people who built it and the community around Subway Builder. Huge thank you to everyone who contributed:

- **kaicardenas0618** - Maintainer of the Subway Builder Modded website and Railyard
- **ahkimn** - Maintainer of the Subway Builder Modded website, Template Mod, and Railyard
- **Kronifer** - Creator of the legacy Map Manager and maintainer of Railyard
- and me!
## For Modders & Map Creators
Want your project in Railyard? Host your files on GitHub, fill out a submission form, and a maintainer will review it.

- Publishing a mod or map: <https://subwaybuildermodded.com/wiki/railyard/latest/developers/publishing-projects>
- Publishing a map pack: <https://subwaybuildermodded.com/wiki/railyard/latest/developers/publishing-map-packs>

And to everyone in the community who has been creating maps, building mods, testing early builds, and giving feedback — thank you. This project is for you! :heart: 

*Railyard is open source - contributions and feedback are welcome on [GitHub](<https://github.com/Subway-Builder-Modded/Railyard>) | Full docs at <https://subwaybuildermodded.com/wiki/railyard/latest/home>*

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.3.1
stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.body:
Recalibrate load-factor thresholds to reflect real world scenario.
A route averaging 50% across the day likely hits 80–90% at rush hour,
which is healthy service, not "underused".
The healthy green band is now 40–80%, and only routes below 20% are
flagged red as under-served.

New thresholds:
- CRITICAL_LOW 40→20,
- WARNING_LOW 55→40,
- CRITICAL_HIGH 90→95.

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.3.0
stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.body:
New Features & Metric Refinement
- Load Factor Metric: Introduced a new analytic metric to track passenger density and vehicle capacity utilization across your subway lines.
- Hourly Data Aggregation: All major metrics (including Load Factor) are now tracked on an hourly basis, allowing you to identify peak congestion times and troughs throughout the day-night cycle.
- Performance Metric (formerly "Usage"): Transformed into a dimensionless multiplier measuring how much ridership a route generates relative to its bidirectional throughput capacity.

Check the "User Guide" for all the details

UI & Visual Enhancements
- System Statistics Dashboard: Refined the GaugeArc design for a cleaner, more readable visual representation of network health.
- Navigation: Updated the PanelBreadcrumb design to improve menu navigation and layout consistency.
- Tooltips: Overhauled tooltip designs

Technical Improvements & Bug Fixes
- LifeCycle Management: Fixed a logic error in lifecycle timing by implementing strict greater-than (>) comparisons.
- Optimized data processing by fully adopting the Accumulator Pattern, eliminating redundant logic and improving performance during high-traffic periods.
- Code Cleanup: Removed deprecated files and legacy logic that were superseded by the new accumulator architecture.

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.2.9
stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.body: Throughput is now reactive on train configuration changes

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.2.7

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.2.6

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.2.1
stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.body: FIX: Allow TransferSankey to adapt accordingly to its content

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.2.0
stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.body:
🆕  Network Stats: SYSTEM LOAD FACTOR and NETWORK HEALTH SCORE (read user guide for more info)
🆕  Transfer Hub Flow (dashboard)
🆕  Commute Flow (route panel) now shows transfer routes
🆕  Picker Dialog: to ease selection routes?station on large systems
⚡ Improved "Commute Flow " labelling 
⚡  "Commute Flow " now show transfers 
⚡ Partially Improved "System Map" clarity  
⚡ You can now select all routes via dropdown 
⚡ Improved performance and navigation by combining Dashboard and Route panel into the same view
⚡ Improved Dropdown design and behavior
🪲  Solved an issue causing the Storage dialogue to be to wide
Several bugs and improvements

stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.name: v1.1.0
stefanorigano/advanced_analytics.body:
Change log:
- AA now remembers your last filters and options, even on game restart.
- Dashboard and route panels now dynamically resize according tho the available room on screen
- Several  bug-fixes and ui optimizations
- ⚠️  Improved compatibly with Railyard :  Breaking Change!


To install the mod manually:
1. Crate the advanced-analytics folder in into your mods directory ( Main Menu > Settings > Mods)
2.  Extract the ZIP content into the advanced-analytics folder you created.
3. Restart the game and activate the "Advanced Analytics"

https://ryandicicco.github.io/Subway-Bui.changelog: Added demand coverage for Uithoorn — residents and commute pairs now included.
Fixed oversized demand bubbles at major employment nodes (Schiphol, Aalsmeer, etc.).

Initial release. Real CBS (Statistics Netherlands) neighborhood data for population and jobs. Commute routes pre-calculated. Coverage includes Amsterdam, Amsterdam-Noord, Zuidoost/Bijlmer, Zuidas, Westpoort, Zaandam, Purmerend, Diemen, Amstelveen, Haarlemmermeer, and Schiphol (EHAM) with all piers.
